title: Pawfect Family® Interactive Feather Toys Set for Cats, sisal and cardboard attachements for cat wand (Natural, 5 pieces)
features: 😺[Unleash the Fun]: Get ready for a playtime with 5 feather toys in 1 box! Watch your cat as they play individually or attach them to our cat teaser for hours of interactive entertainment.
🌍 [Eco-Friendly Delight]: Our toys are crafted from sustainable materials like wood, sisal and feathers, ensuring a guilt-free play experience for your earth conscious furry friend.

🐭 [Whisker Wonderland]: Our toy set features a variety of sisal toys (mouse, fish, ball) that ignite your cat's curiosity, plus two wooden toys with captivating bells that awaken their natural hunting instincts.
🎣 [Effortless Attachment]: Each toy comes with a convenient hanging loop, making attachment to our cat wand a breeze. (The wand is not included.)
🛍 Commitment to Excellence: With Pawfect Family, it's not just a purchase; it's an experience. And we stand by our promise of quality. If you're not elated, neither are we.
